meta.description: Final research dataset for the 100 apps. = knowledge-first-pass baseline with the 18 web-verified sample apps corrected against official docs, plus the stricter mcp_status field applied across all 100. 'verified':true marks the 18 doc-checked apps; 'corrected':true marks apps whose fields changed after verification.
meta.caveat: mcp_status is the lowest-confidence dimension for the 82 non-sample apps: verification proved parametric knowledge UNDER-counts newly-shipped official MCPs, so treat 'community'/'none' on unverified rows as 'not confirmed official' rather than 'definitely no official MCP'.
